examples: The US magazine Forbes has selected the grave periscope as the kookiest invention in the country.
OOPEAA designed the Periscope Tower as part of a larger project to improve facilities on the lakeshore.
Ushakov submitted his radical design, which included a conning tower and periscope, to senior officers in 1936.
The Iraqi air force, devastated by the Gulf War, had only 80 to 100 operational combat aircraft, according to Periscope.
In the game Steel Diver the 3DS functions as a submarine periscope, with the screen displaying a view of enemy ships on the surface.
